  "findings": [
    "Motor disconnect is not within sight of the motor location or driven machinery."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate the disconnect switch to be within sight of the motor, or install an additional lockable local disconnect switch at the motor location."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 430.102 requires a disconnecting means to be located in sight from the motor location and the driven machinery. Since the disconnect is not within sight, it fails to meet this safety standard, posing a high risk of accidental energization during maintenance.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 430.102"
  ]
}
